title: Ubiquiti UDB-IoT, Wireless Wi-Fi bridge
description: The Ubiquiti Device Bridge IoT is a compact wireless Wi-Fi 4 bridge for IoT devices featuring (1) 10/100Mbps port , an internal antenna and (1) RP-SMA connector for an external antenna . It connects any ethernet device to a 2.4GHz UniFi Wi-Fi network using the Auto-Link function. The deviceâs maximum power consumption is 2.3W (1) 10/100Mbps port and (1) RP-SMA female connector for an external antenna Wireless throughput up to 300Mbps at 2.4GHz (2x2) Internal antenna LED signal strength indicator UniFi Wi-Fi Auto-Link for automatic connection to UniFi APs Power supply via USB-C , or 4-pin automotive DC connector (9-30V) Device External omnidirectional antenna Wall mounting kit DIN rail mounting kit
